prompt: Users cannot tell whether changes were saved.
context: product form · edits persist via async API · users unsure if work is safe
expected_behaviour: implement an explicit pending → saving → saved (and error) state model
announce save status to assistive tech via aria-live
surface failure and retry, not just success
avoid confetti, blocking modals or ambiguous spinners
judgement: Pass if it ships a complete pending/saving/saved/error model with an aria-live announcement and a visible error path.
